Strategic_Vision.Definition: Reverse-engineering the final settlement artifact (PDF/ESX) to reconstruct the initial claim truth, bypassing manual entry.
Strategic_Vision.Objective: Transform unstructured legacy outputs into structured, actionable data assets.

CapOut.Gap: Lacks granular line-item visibility for risk assessment; relies on aggregate totals.

JobNimbus.Gap: Manages file status but treats the estimate as a 'blob'; no semantic understanding of line items.

ValueLink.Gap: Focused on appraisal/valuation, not restoration scope-of-loss granularity.

Competitive_Landscape.Market_Opportunity: Vertical integration of parsing (The Wedge) with structured data analytics (The Moat).

Phase_1_The_Wedge.Technique: Hybrid OCR + LayoutLM + ESX/XML Ground Truth Validation
Phase_1_The_Wedge.Key_Differentiator: Utilization of proprietary 'Grand Total Areas' and 'Labor Minimums' anchor logic to achieve >99% accuracy.

Phase_2_The_Moat.Value_Prop: Benchmarking CAT/SEL usage, localized pricing trends, and automated supplement detection.
Phase_2_The_Moat.Mechanism: Mapping parsed data to a normalized schema (Activity + Category + Selector + Quality).
